items.title: Holiday travel with BMW and MINI electric vehicles: Arrive with even greater peace of mind. Tue Jul 21 08:30:00 CEST 2026 Press Release - Full price transparency, total control over costs and an expanded BMW Group Charging network make charging on the go even easier – especially when travelling long distances. - New features in the vehicle app and the vehicle itself provide clarity on the actual charging costs incurred. - The BMW Group Charging network already comprises 1.1 million charging points in Europe alone. J05 · U25 · i20 · U11 · U10 · NA5 · G65 · 3 Series · iX · Charging Infrastructure · Technology · BMW i · Aceman · iX3 · i5 · Cooper · i7
